About Us

Protecting Your World with Expertise and Innovation

At Donture Systems Ltd, we’re committed to safeguarding what matters most with cutting-edge security and surveillance solutions. With years of industry experience, we deliver tailored safety systems for homes, businesses, and fleets across Kenya. From advanced CCTV surveillance to fire detection and access control, our mission is to provide peace of mind through reliable, high-quality technology.

“Ensuring your safety with smart, proactive solutions—because protection starts with trust”

We specialize in CCTV systems, GPS tracking, fire alarms, and access control, offering end-to-end protection for your property and loved ones.
High-quality solutions are backed by 24/7 support and professional installation, ensuring long-term reliability.

WHAT WE DO

Our Services

GPS Tracker Installation

Protect and monitor your cars, fleets, and motorcycles in real-time with our GPS tracking systems, complete with anti-theft features, remote immobilization, and speed limiters for enhanced road safety.

Access Control & Gate Automation

Protect your premises with our advanced access control systems, available across Kenya, including major cities like Nairobi, Mombasa, and Kisumu. At Donture Systems Ltd, we specialize in access control systems in Kenya, offering biometric and RFID solutions to secure your business, office, or residential property.

CCTV Surveillance Systems

Experience crystal-clear, real-time monitoring with our advanced HD cameras featuring night vision, motion detection, AI-powered analytics, remote viewing via mobile app, and secure cloud storage

Alarm System Installation

Safeguard your property with our top-rated alarm installation services, available across Kenya, including major cities like Nairobi, Mombasa, and Kisumu. At Donture Systems Ltd, we specialize in advanced intruder alarm systems in Nairobi, designed to protect your home, office, or commercial space with cutting-edge security solutions.

Speed Governor Installation

Ensure the safety and efficiency of your commercial fleet with our top-rated speed governor installation services.we specialize in advanced speed governor systems, designed to control vehicle speeds and enhance road safety for your business vehicles

Electric fence installation

we offer reliable electric fence installation in kenya, ensuring seamless setups for residential properties. Whether you need electric fence for home security or industrial security, we deliver cutting-edge technology and expert service for your peace of mind.
